creator: bsdcode@disroot.org
text:
Created attachment 248566
patch

I discovered the project expects a C++14 compatible compiler: https://github.com/gemrb/gemrb/commit/7b078c25e06b819996df3fb82239b2172ce9408a
In order to comply I use compiler:c++14-lang instead of compiler:c++11-lang now.

I also discovered that the pkg-message is defect. The Makefile is missing a SUB_FILES=pkg-message, therefore no pkg-message is generated. While I am at it I also modernized the pkg-message itself.

So the updated patch notes are:

- use GCC (https://github.com/gemrb/gemrb/issues/1786)
- add optional OpenGL and SDL2_mixer support
- add disabled pixelscaling to screensize option
- change GemRB.cfg into a proper conffile
  (remove from pkg-plist and annotate GemRB.cfg.sample with @sample)
- make PNG, OGG, TTF and OpenAL support optional
- fix pkg-message
  (apply SUB_FILES and modernize it)
- use compiler:c++14-lang
- remove gnome and localbase uses
- remove DOC_DIR and MAN_DIR from CMAKE_ARGS
- set CMake options explicitly
- use CMake options helpers for boolean options
- organize options into AUDIO, RESOURCE and VIDEO groups
